title: OUTSIDE IN DAY PROGRAM - 211info
text: OUTSIDE IN OUTSIDE IN DAY PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A drop in center that provides basic needs services such as meals, recreation/activities, showers, laundry, phone, mailing address, and computers. Also offers a safe space for LGBTQ youth. 1132 SW 13th Avenue Portland, OR 97205 Eligibility: Ages 16-24 who are experiencing homelessness and are eligible to enter the Homeless Youth Continuum Hours: Drop-In: Tuesday/Thursday/Sunday 1pm-6pm Breakfast: Monday-Friday 9am-10am Lunch: Sunday-Friday 1pm-2pm Dinner: Sunday-Friday 5pm-6pm Email (503) 535-3800 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 535-3800 Intake (503) 432-3986 Access Center Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in for basic services. For more extensive services like case management, call the Access Center for screening. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Services: Community Meals * Homeless Youth Homeless Drop In Centers * At Risk Youth Laundry Facilities * Homeless Youth Public Internet Access Sites * Homeless Youth Public Showers/Baths * Homeless Youth Telephone Facilities * Homeless Youth Temporary Mailing Address * Homeless Youth Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE-ENROLLING HOUSING/SHELTER - YOUTH HOUSING PROGRAM HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON CONTRACEPTIVE CARE LEGAL SERVICES - ID PROJECT OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - MEDICAL CLINIC SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - TRANS CLINIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OUTSIDE IN
